title: KEPEAK Tyre Inflator Air Compressor - Cordless Car Tyre Pump - Portable Electric Air Pump 150 PSI with Digital Display, LED Light, USB Rechargeable, Electric Tyre Pumps for Cars Bike Motorbike.
features: High Speed Electric Air Pump: Boasting a maximum pressure of 150 PSI, this tyre inflator air compressor enables rapid inflation. Cordless car tyre pump can inflate a car tyre from 33 PSI to 36 PSI in just 1 minutes, making it highly efficient for cars, bikes, and motorcycles, car tyre inflator ensuring you get back on the road quickly. Cordless tyre inflator is the ideal car tyre inflator air compressor for quick top-ups, emergenciesor regular maintenance.

Compact and Portable: Cordless electric air pump dimensions of 1.73*2.52*6.18 inch and Car tyre pump weight of 0.93ibs this electric air pump ckpack, or bike bag, making it convenient to take with you wherever you go for on-demand inflation.

Precise and Clear: Car Tyre pump equipped with a high-precision digital display, this electric tyre pumps for cars shows pressure readings with an accuracy of 0.5 PSL. You can clearly monitor the real-time pressure during inflation, and the electric tyre pumps for cars auto-shutoff function activates when the preset pressure is reached, preventing over-inflation.

Long Lasting Battery: Featuring a built-in rechargeable lithium battery, this cordless car tyre pump offers long standby time. Electric air pump can be charged via USB, electric air pump providing flexible charging options whether you're at home, in the car, or outdoors. A single full charge can inflate multiple tyres, tyre pump meeting your various inflation needs.

Multi Purpose: Car tyre inflator comes with multiple valve adapters, car tyre inflator suitable for inflating car tyres, bike tyres, motorcycle tyres, sports balls, and inflatable toys. Cordless bike pump also has a built-in LED flashlight with two modes (steady and flashing), which is convenient for inflation in dark environments and can be used as an emergency signal light when needed.
description: Product Description KEPEAK Tire Inflator Portable Air Compressor-150PSI Cordless Air Pumps Application : Suitable for inflating: - All inflatable balls (football, basketball, etc.) ;- Bicycle, motorcycle, e-bike, wheelchair, and balance bike tires;- Small car tires (up to 225mm width) ;- Emergency tire pressure top-ups;Ideal for Cyclists, drivers, parents, outdoor enthusiasts. Previous page Control Buttons M Button: Short press to power on/off or switch modes; long press to activate. +/- Buttons: Adjust targets pressure. U utton: Short press to toggle units (PSI/Bar/kPa); long press to lock settings. Auto Off Inflation Speed:15-18L/min Noise-Level: ≤85dB (measured at 1m distance) Charging Port: Type-C Note: Manual provided in English. For optimal performance, fully charge before first use. Next page Package Including: 1 * Tire Inflator Portable Air Compressor ; 1 * Manual Descriptions(Black & white print,English); 1 * 155mm US-standard hose; 1 * Ball needle; 1 * Valves adapters; 1 * Type-C charging cable; 1 * Waterproof storage bag; Tire Inflator Portable Air Compressor﻿ Design & Material: ABS casing with large LED screen for clear visibility. Ultra-compact size: 44x64x157mm (fits in palms or glovebox). Long battery life: 15-20 minutes runtime (fills 8-12 bike tires per charge). Dimensions: 44×64×157mm Battery Capacit-y: 2×2500mAh / 7.4V / 18.5Wh;Overcharge Protection: 8.4V; Over-discharge Protection: 6V: Charging Time: 2-3 hours;Cycle Life: 300 cycles (retains 80% capacity) ; Motor Type: Brushed motor (15,000 RPM); Overcurrent Protection: Yes; Lifespan: 200-400 hours; Motor Power: 35W; Charging Input: 10W (5V/2A); Cylinder Size:17mm (for 175-225mm tires); Operating Temperature: -10°C to 45°C; Pressure Range: 0-150 PSI ; Inflation Speed:15-18L/min; Previous page Next page
